meaning: v.来回摇动,摆动n.来回摇动,摆动
examples: When they return they do a "waggle dance" for their spot, and other scouts will then fly off and investigate it.
The more they liked their nest, the more vigorous and lengthy their waggle dance and the more bees will choose to visit it.
This led some scientists to suggest that the waggle dance was in fact performing a much simpler task.
The main method is to put a garden fork into the ground and you waggle it back and to for all of your worth.
